TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Smddug_kingal_lubuy_bunga_duri,_brah_niya_o_smmung_kingal_laqi_duri, title = Smddug_kingal_lubuy_bunga_duri,_brah_niya_o_smmung_kingal_laqi_duri, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Smddug_kingal_lubuy_bunga_duri,_brah_niya_o_smmung_kingal_laqi_duri} }

S.FORM: Sbiyaw o saw nii ka rudan qrijil, musa qpahan ka kingal qrijil, miyah alang gbiyan do, mapa bunga ka bukuy na, smddug kingal lubuy bunga duri, brah niya o smmung kingal laqi duri.
S.PHON: sbijaw o saw nii ka ɾudan qɾiɟil, musa qpaħan ka kiŋal qɾiɟil, mijaħ alaŋ gbijan do, mapa buŋa ka bukuj na, smddug kiŋal lubuj buŋa duɾi, bɾaħ nija o smmuŋ kiŋal laqi duɾi.
S.FORM: Sbiyaw o saw nii ka rudan qrijil, musa qpahan ka kingal qrijil, miyah alang gbiyan do, mapa bunga ka bukuy na, smddug kingal lubuy bunga duri, brah niya o smmung kingal laqi duri.
S.PHON: sbijaw o saw nii ka ɾudan qɾiɟil, musa qpaħan ka kiŋal qɾiɟil, mijaħ alaŋ gbijan do, mapa buŋa ka bukuj na, smddug kiŋal lubuj buŋa duɾi, bɾaħ nija o smmuŋ kiŋal laqi duɾi.
